response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:09: Intro scene. 2. 00:09: 'アンバランスなKissをして' starts. Metadata identified from on-screen text. Lyrics found on uta-net.com. 3. 04:08: 'GHOST SWEEPER' starts. Metadata identified from on-screen text. Lyrics reconstructed from established knowledge of the song 'GS〜GHOST SWEEPER〜' by Satomi Arimori and Toshiyuki Omori.
response.global_summary: A musical performance by three VTubers (Watame, Okayu, Lui) featuring two songs: 'Unbalance na Kiss wo Shite' and 'GHOST SWEEPER'.

scenes.description: The performance begins with 'Unbalance na Kiss wo Shite'. The VTubers are on a high-tech platform with a large moon in the background. 'Music: Takahashi Hiro' is credited.
scenes.song_title: アンバランスなKissをして
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
割れた鏡の中 映る君の姿
泣いている 泣いている
細い月をなぞる指 誰を呼んでいるの
消えた恋の背中
何度でも 何度でも 君の窓を叩くから
夜の加速度に 背中押されて
糸が切れる様に
ただ、君を 君を強く 抱いてた
アンバランスなKissを交わして
愛に近づけよ
君の涙も 哀しい嘘も 僕の心に 眠れ
昨日へのMerry-go-round 君を運んでゆく
止めたくて 止めたくて 僕は鍵を探してる
崩れ落ちそうな 空を支えて ひとり立ち尽くす
ただ、君の 君の側に いたいよ
アンバランスなKissで書かれた
ふたりのシナリオ
愛と呼ぶほど 強くなくても
君のすべてが 痛い
ただ、君の 君の側に いたいよ
アンバランスなKissを交わして
愛に近づけよ
君の涙も 哀しい嘘も 僕の心に 眠れ
君の心が僕を呼ぶまで
抱きしめあえる日まで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
In the cracked mirror, your reflection is crying, crying
Fingers tracing the thin moon, who are you calling for?
The back of a vanished love
Again and again, again and again
I'll knock on your window
Driven by the acceleration of the night
Like a thread being cut
I was just holding you, holding you strongly
Exchange an unbalanced kiss
And get closer to love
Even your tears, even your sad lies
Sleep in my heart
Merry-go-round to yesterday, carrying you away
I want to stop it, I want to stop it
I'm searching for the key
Supporting the sky that's about to collapse
I stand all alone
I just want to be, to be by your side
Written with an unbalanced kiss
The script of the two of us
Even if it's not strong enough to be called love
Everything about you is painful
I just want to be, to be by your side
Exchange an unbalanced kiss
And get closer to love
Even your tears, even your sad lies
Sleep in my heart
Until your heart calls out to me
Until the day we can hold each other again

scenes.description: The performance transitions to 'GHOST SWEEPER'. Text 'Music: Omori Toshiyuki' appears. The VTubers continue to perform on the same platform with pyrotechnics.

GS... GHOST SWEEPER

長い髪なびかせて 悩ましげなボディ
この都会をハイヒールで 飛び回れば

血迷った 危ない奴らなら
極楽へいかせちゃうわ
Ah... GHOST SWEEPER
GS... GHOST SWEEPER
Ah... GHOST SWEEPER
GS... GHOST SWEEPER
大胆な私の業のどれでも

Ah... GHOST SWEEPER
GS... GHOST SWEEPER
Ah... GHOST SWEEPER
GS... GHOST SWEEPER
Letting your long hair flutter, a teasing body
If you fly around this city in high heels
Big money coming, yeah!
At the foot of the skyscraper, a trap of anachronism
If you're a dangerous guy who has gone astray
I'll send you to paradise
